replies.what is cisetu: CISETU is a complete village governance platform that helps gram panchayats manage property records, automate tax calculations, and send bulk WhatsApp communications — all from one unified portal.
replies.pricing:
We offer two tiers:

**CISETU Vikas** — ₹18,999/yr
1 user, up to 1,000 properties, 1 bot included.

**CISETU Pragati** — ₹24,999/yr
Unlimited users & properties, 10 bots, 24×7 support, custom domain.
replies.whatsapp: Our Bulk Dispatch Node sends high-volume rich media messages with intelligent anti-ban delay protocols. Track delivery, manage contact clusters, and achieve near 100% open rates.
replies.property: The Smart Directory manages complex property arrays, occupant details, and automated XLSX ledger exports — handling 5,000+ properties with real-time sync.
replies.tax: The Vyvsay Tax Engine automates municipal business tax calculations, generates digital receipts, and tracks pending dues — reducing manual errors by 99%.
replies.vyvsay: The Vyvsay Tax Engine automates municipal business tax calculations, generates digital receipts, and tracks pending dues — reducing manual errors by 99%.
replies.support: Contact us via WhatsApp at +91 95589 81800 or email hello@cisetu.com. Pragati tier users get 24×7 dedicated support.
replies.help: Contact us via WhatsApp at +91 95589 81800 or email hello@cisetu.com. Pragati tier users get 24×7 dedicated support.
replies.demo: We'd love to show you around! Contact us via WhatsApp at +91 95589 81800 to schedule a live walkthrough.

default_reply: For detailed information, please contact our team via WhatsApp at +91 95589 81800 or email hello@cisetu.com.
